---
name: New design pattern or interview design
about: Propose a new pattern, interview design, or reference architecture
title: "[design] <slug>"
labels: ["content", "design"]
---

## Kind

- [ ] Pattern (`docs/02-patterns/`)
- [ ] Interview design (`docs/03-interview-designs/`)
- [ ] Reference architecture (`docs/04-reference-architectures/`)

## Title and slug
<!-- e.g., "Real-time leaderboard" / slug: real-time-leaderboard -->

## One-line summary
<!-- The "what this is" sentence that will sit under the title. -->

## Why this design
<!-- What problem does it solve? Who's asking for it (interview prep, on-the-job reference, both)? -->

## Planned hard-part deep dives
<!-- Two or three problems you plan to dig into in the "Deep Dives" section. -->

## AWS services involved
<!-- Rough list — you can refine in the PR. -->

## Diagram plan

- [ ] High-level architecture diagram (`diagrams` Python)
- [ ] Sequence diagram (Mermaid) — if relevant
- [ ] Data model ERD (Mermaid `erDiagram`)
